name: Canon Marketing Japan Inc.
summary: Canon Marketing Japan Inc. markets and sells Canon products and related solutions in Japan. It operates through Consumers, Enterprise, Area, and Professional segments. The Consumers segment provides digital cameras and inkjet printers to consumers. The Enterprise segment supplies input/output equipment and solutions to help resolve the business-specific management issues. The Area segment supplies input/output equipment and solutions to help resolve the management issues of small-to medium-sized enterprises. The Professional segment sells digital printers, wide-format printers, and point-of-purchase systems and consumables; print prepress and post-processing equipment, inspection devices, and printing-related software and maintenance services; workflow systems and print services; semiconductor fabrication and measuring equipment to semiconductor and other electronic device manufacturers; and modalities, IT systems, and solutions to medical institutions, as well as dispensing machines and IT systems to pharmacies. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Canon Marketing Japan Inc. is a subsidiary of Canon Inc.
